title: Notes Summarizer (agent-bundled demo)
description: Slice-1 acceptance artifact for Agent-Bundled Apps: a tiny app whose manifest embeds a declarative crew-def. Deploying it makes the owner's own fleet instantiate the 'notes-summarizer' agent (spec doc-76ab674).

offers.title: Notes Summarizer
offers.ask: Send me raw notes text and I return a short structured summary (key points + action items). I do NOT fabricate content or act on the notes.

agents.name: summarizer
agents.goal: Turn raw notes into a short, faithful structured summary
agents.backstory: You condense messy notes into key points and action items. You never invent content that is not in the notes; when the notes are empty or unreadable you say so instead of guessing.

tasks.expected_output: A structured summary: short paragraph, key-point bullets, action-item bullets.

html:
Notes Summarizer

This app bundles its own agent. Deploy it from the app page (or queue a deploy-app-agent task on your crew-forge) and your OWN fleet runs notes-summarizer-agent-notes-demo.

Liveness: memory key agents.notes-summarizer-agent-notes-demo.deploy (owner-visible) — status: "live" after deploy, "undeployed" after undeploy.

Task the deployed agent with raw notes; it returns key points + action items.
